vocab.meaning: trải qua một sự biến đổi diện mạo hoàn toàn
vocab.example: In the last five years, my hometown has undergone a radical transformation from a sleepy village to a satellite city.
The urban landscape has been reshaped by the emergence of countless high-rise apartment complexes.

vocab.meaning: cơ sở hạ tầng hiện đại bậc nhất
vocab.example: The introduction of state-of-the-art infrastructure, such as the new metro system, has significantly reduced commute times.

vocab.meaning: quá trình chỉnh trang đô thị (thường đi kèm việc giá cả và mức sống tăng cao)
vocab.example: The gentrification of the old quarters has brought in upscale boutiques but also driven up the cost of living.

vocab.meaning: một trung tâm thương mại sầm uất
vocab.example: What used to be an abandoned industrial site has now been repurposed into a bustling commercial hub.
As the economy grew, trendy cafes and co-working spaces began to proliferate across every corner of the district.

vocab.meaning: mất đi vẻ quyến rũ/nét đặc sắc ban đầu
vocab.example: Many elderly residents complain that the area has lost its original charm due to over-commercialization.

vocab.meaning: đô thị toàn bê tông (thường mang nghĩa tiêu cực về việc thiếu mảng xanh)
vocab.example: I'm concerned that the rapid development is turning our neighborhood into a lifeless concrete jungle.

vocab.meaning: sự tăng trưởng chưa từng thấy
vocab.example: The suburb has witnessed unprecedented growth in its population and number of amenities lately.

vocab.meaning: sự hối hả và nhộn nhịp
vocab.example: The area has become much noisier, and the hustle and bustle of the city is now felt at all hours of the day.
